subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-20
subcodes.first_line: As long as a thing is rare and scarce, it seems more attractive and has greater value.... In the past, they used to prevent girls from learning to read and write
subcodes.subjects: @scarcity of receptive souls, @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
